messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Is Mencius a text that Socrates had any hand in writing?

No. Socrates had no hand in writing the Mencius. The Mencius is a classical Chinese philosophical text attributed to Mencius (孟子), a Confucian thinker who lived in the 4th century BCE. Socrates was a Greek philosopher of an earlier generation, and the two traditions developed entirely independently. There is no scholarly basis for connecting Socrates to the Mencius in any way.
